rationale: No conflict. The homestead exemption increase concerns property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b), while Gov't Code §2306.093 governs TDHCA's internal housing fund allocation goal for very low income assistance. Different domains, no operative interaction.
quote: By action of the board the community affairs division shall have a goal to apply a minimum of 25 percent of the division's total housing-related funds toward housing assistance for individuals and families of very low income.
_note: No direct or indirect statutory conflict identified between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing assistance goal provision.
